title: LongPoint Announces Cash Distribution on MOAT ETF
content: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - May 21, 2026) - LongPoint Asset Management Inc. ("LongPoint") is pleased to announce the monthly cash distribution for the Moat Active Premium Yield ETF (the "Moat ETF") listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol (TSX: MOAT). The Moat ETF seeks to provide high income and moderate capital growth primarily by writing put options on a portfolio of North American equity securities. Unitholders of record on May 28, 2026, will receive a cash distribution.

title: Cummins CEO Explains How to Manage the AI Boom
content: Cummins —the dominant maker of diesel engine technology—finds itself, happily, caught up in the artificial-intelligence data-center boom. CEO Jennifer Rumsey’s company is no stranger to boom-bust business cycles, and she says it can navigate the swings in AI demand, partly from its experience selling heavy-duty truck engines. Cummins’ AI-related business—supplying backup power for data centers—has sent the stock’s valuation to levels not seen in a decade.
